apps.name: Slack ops alerts
apps.description: Route KDS backlog, packing exceptions, and route delays into Slack channels with SI-scoped webhook mapping.
apps.honestyNote: SI-led implementation — contact partner for scoping and workspace mapping.

apps.name: Klaviyo customer sync
apps.description: Push storefront orders, loyalty tiers, and allergen-safe segments into Klaviyo for email and SMS journeys.
apps.honestyNote: Certified SI builds the connector — not a self-serve OAuth install yet.

apps.name: MarginEdge inventory bridge
apps.description: Reconcile purchased ingredients and depletion signals with MarginEdge for prime-cost visibility.
apps.honestyNote: Requires SI mapping between OS Kitchen recipes and MarginEdge item masters.

apps.name: Gusto payroll export
apps.description: Export approved time-clock and tip-pool summaries into Gusto payroll runs with audit trails.
apps.honestyNote: Uses existing time-clock and tip-pool exports — SI configures Gusto import templates.

apps.name: Google Reserve / Maps booking
apps.description: Surface OS Kitchen reservation availability on Google Reserve with two-way hold sync for full-service operators.
apps.honestyNote: Requires live reservation widget plus SI Google Reserve onboarding.

roadmap.name: OAuth app install
roadmap.description: Self-serve partner OAuth consent, scoped API tokens, and install/uninstall lifecycle per workspace.
roadmap.honestyNote: Phase 3 BETA — sandbox OAuth install available in dashboard.

roadmap.name: Outbound webhook subscriptions
roadmap.description: Merchant-configured outbound events (order.created, inventory.updated) with HMAC signing and retries.
roadmap.honestyNote: Phase 2 — documented in app marketplace RFC; Enterprise API remains separate.

roadmap.name: Embedded admin extensions
roadmap.description: Signed iframe or App Bridge host for partner UI inside dashboard settings sidebars.
roadmap.honestyNote: Requires OAuth app install and security review pipeline first.
